title: Toggle User Interface between Admin, Member, User and View for Developers
excerpt: As the Administrator and key developer of our Monday.com account, it would be very helpful if I could toggle between Administrator, Member, and User interfaces to see how board permissions/restrictions were setup.  I und…

posts.author: JHolden1975 (Jason Holden)
posts.cookedHtml:
As the Administrator and key developer of our Monday.com account, it would be very helpful if I could toggle between Administrator, Member, and User interfaces to see how board permissions/restrictions were setup. I understand that I could login under a different username, but I’d like to simply try it out quickly on both my computer and mobile device to understand the user’s functionality. Is there a way already or is this something that could be done relatively easily?

Thank you.

posts.author: hbristol (Heather Bristol)
posts.cookedHtml: @JHolden1975 I am in the same boat and don’t know of any way to do that, but it would be very handy!!
